teamMembers.name: Troy
teamMembers.bio: Architecting the core sound of the collective. Specializes in heavy analog synthesis and rhythmic structure.

teamMembers.name: Gary
teamMembers.bio: Bringing clarity to chaos. Focusing on high-fidelity, hybrid mixing using both vintage and modern gear.

teamMembers.name: Matt
teamMembers.bio: Crafting bespoke audio textures, cinematic soundscapes, and driving the experimental edge of our productions.
